sections.label: 🐛 Bug Fixes
items: Fixed indentation of the pe_enable_debug_logging return statement inside the VZ_MBLibrary constructor callback — the line was two levels under-indented relative to the surrounding arrow function body.

Fixed inaccurate performance timer: Lib.time(timerLabel) / Lib.timeEnd(timerLabel) previously bracketed only the synchronous Promise creation of displayArtGallery(), not the actual async fetch+render work, so the timer always reported ~0 ms. The execution block now wraps the call in a small async IIFE and awaits displayArtGallery(), so Lib.timeEnd() fires only after the full gallery render cycle completes.

sections.label: ✨ New Features / Changes
items: Renamed all configSchema keys from the generic 'ca_' prefix to 'pe_' (Page Enhancer) to better reflect the script's identity and avoid potential key collisions with other userscripts sharing the same VZ_MBLibrary storage backend. Affected keys: ca_enable_debug_logging → pe_enable_debug_logging, ca_image_size → pe_image_size, ca_collapsed_by_default → pe_collapsed_by_default.

Added new boolean setting 'pe_enable_caa_eaa' (default: true) in the CAA/EAA ILLUSTRATED DISCOGRAPHY config section. When set to false, the entire CAA/EAA art gallery feature is skipped at runtime without any DOM changes.

Added new config section 'SECTION TOGGLING' with boolean setting 'pe_enable_section_toggling' (default: true). When set to false, the collapsible h2 header behaviour is completely disabled and initPageHeaders() exits immediately.

Added comprehensive debug/warning logging with icons/glyphs throughout all major code paths: startup (🚀), MBID/DOM detection (🔎), feature-flag guards (🚫), HTTP fetch lifecycle (🌐📡📦), gallery DOM construction (🖼️🏷️🔽🔼), per-image rendering details, section toggling events (🖱️), skipped/empty state warnings (⚠️), and success confirmations (✅). All debug messages are gated behind pe_enable_debug_logging and routed through Lib.debug()/Lib.warn()/Lib.error().

sections.label: 🐛 Bug Fixes
items: ChangeLog entry missing from Tampermonkey browser menu — root cause: VZ_MBLibrary.fetchRemoteText() uses GM_xmlhttpRequest to fetch the remote changelog JSON, but ReleasePageEnhancer did not declare @grant GM_xmlhttpRequest in its userscript header. Without that grant GM_xmlhttpRequest is undefined at runtime; fetchCachedText() therefore returned {data:null} immediately, initRemoteContent() exited early, and GM_registerMenuCommand('📜 ChangeLog', …) was never reached. Fix: added @grant GM_xmlhttpRequest to the ==UserScript== header. ShowAllEntityData already carried this grant (which is why its ChangeLog menu entry worked).

sections.label: ✨ New Features / Changes
items: Extended collapsible header behaviour (light-orange background, Click to toggle, Ctrl+Click to toggle all) to all native MusicBrainz h2 section headers on the page (e.g. 'Track listing', 'Additional details', 'Relationships'), not just the script-added CAA/EAA art gallery headers. Each h2's sibling content is wrapped in a collapsible div. The new shared attachHeaderBehavior() helper is called by both initPageHeaders() and displayArtGallery(), keeping the implementation DRY.

sections.label: ✨ New Features / Changes
items: Enhanced gallery headers: archive-aware tooltips now read 'Click to show/hide CAA Art Images' or 'Click to show/hide EAA Art Images' (two-line tooltip, second line explains Ctrl+Click). Added light-orange background (#FFE4B5 / moccasin), padding, and border-radius to all art gallery h2 headers. Ctrl+Click on any art gallery header now collapses or expands all script-managed galleries at once.

sections.label: ✨ New Features / Changes
items: Added event art support for MusicBrainz event pages. On event pages, artwork is now fetched from the Event Art Archive (eventartarchive.org/event/<mbid>) instead of the Cover Art Archive. The displayArtGallery() function is generalised with archiveUrl and artLabel parameters; the execution block detects the page type (release vs. event) and passes the correct archive URL, human-readable label ('Cover art' / 'Event art'), and short acronym ('CAA' / 'EAA') accordingly.

sections.label: ⚙️ Internal
items: Refactored settings, logging and changelog handling to an external shared library (VZ_MBLibrary).
